description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a low-pitched, dark gray gable roof featuring multiple blue solar panels arranged in rows. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden siding, giving it a warm, natural appearance. Large glass sliding doors and windows are present on the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house is surrounded by a paved stone patio, with a white patio umbrella and outdoor seating area visible at the front. Mature green trees and shrubs are planted around the property, providing shade and privacy. A carport with a sloped roof is attached to one side, and an air conditioning unit is mounted on the exterior wall.
description: A modern, single-story wooden bungalow with a gable roof covered in solar panels, large glass doors, a carport, and surrounding greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors, patio with umbrella, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, air conditioning unit, and a tall climbing plant on the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the carport roof, back wall, and additional greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the full array of solar panels on the roof and a stone patio along the facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
